name: set msg.db
set msg.db.error
write upload data
set http response
command unzip
func:
const name = msg.uibuildername;
msg.command =
    `sh -c 'ZIP="/data/uibuilder/backend-dist.zip"; ` +
    `DST="/data/uibuilder/${name}/src"; ` +
    `TMP="$(mktemp -d)"; ` +
    `mkdir -p "$DST"; ` +
    `unzip -q -o "$ZIP" -d "$TMP"; ` +
    `SRC="$TMP/dist"; [ -d "$SRC" ] || SRC="$TMP"; ` +
    `rm -rf "$DST"/*; ` +
    `cp -a "$SRC"/. "$DST"/; ` +
    `chmod -R u+rw,g+rw,o+rw "$DST"; ` +
    `rm -rf "$TMP"'`;

return msg;

name: command update
token extractor
build api-catalog linkset
build OpenAPI 3.0 doc
